title: Contact
seo_title: Contact — Hire a Freelance Front-End Developer in Denver | Austin Schuetz
seo_description: Get in touch with Austin Schuetz, a Denver freelance front-end developer and AI integration partner. Front-end, full-stack, and Claude API work.

blocks.heading: Tell me what you're building.
blocks.lede_md: The more concrete, the better. Even a rough sketch of the idea is enough to get us started.

blocks.body_md:
I'm based in **Denver, Colorado** and work with clients here and remotely. Here's what I'm available for:

- **Freelance front-end & WordPress builds** — new sites, redesigns, and rescuing the ones that broke.
- **Full-stack product engineering** — from idea to shipped, with users and payments.
- **AI & Claude integration partnerships** — a technical partner for startups adding real AI, built on the Claude API.

I read everything that comes through this form and usually reply within a couple of business days. If it's urgent, say so in the message.

blocks.heading: Send a message
blocks.success_message: Thanks — your message is in. I'll get back to you within a couple of business days.

blocks.heading: Prefer email?
blocks.body_md: Reach me directly and I'll pick it up from there.
